title: QPB harness result record
description: Terminal record written by `qpb_harness_tick.py` to results/result-NNNNN.json when a run reaches a terminal state. Sourced from the worker's terminal heartbeat sentinel (completed/failed) or synthesized by the harness (auth_or_launch_failed — no worker terminal was ever emitted).

terminal_status.description: Upper-cased terminal status. auth_or_launch_failed runs record FAILED with synthesized=true.

result_file.description: Path of the worker's result file (quality/SUMMARY.md or equivalent), from the terminal heartbeat. null when synthesized.

summary.description: One-line outcome from the terminal heartbeat, or the synthesis reason.

reaped_ts.description: ISO8601 UTC time the harness reaped this run.

synthesized.description: true when the harness wrote this record WITHOUT a worker terminal heartbeat (launch failure / abandon).

anomaly.description: Set when a guard fired during reap (e.g. claimed_job_file_absent_at_reap) — the transition completed on the heartbeat's authority but the on-disk claimed file was unexpectedly absent.

claimed.description: Snapshot of the claimed job file at reap (the wrapped plan entry), when it was present.
